classdef {{ class_name }} < openminds.abstract.ControlledTerm

%

%

%   {{ " " * (max_property_name_length+2) }} {{prop.doc}}
    {%- if not loop.last%}
%       {# Add blank line to separate each property #}
    {%- endif -%}
    {%- endfor %}

%   This class was auto-generated by the openMINDS pipeline

    properties (Constant, Hidden)
        X_TYPE = "{{openminds_type}}"
    end

    properties (Constant, Hidden)
        CONTROLLED_INSTANCES = [ ...
        {%- for instance_name in known_instance_list %}
        {%- if not loop.last%}
            "{{instance_name}}", ...
        {%- else%}
            "{{instance_name}}" ...
        {%- endif -%}
            
        {%- endfor %}
        ]
    end
    {%- if additional_controlled_term_props %}

    properties
    {%- for prop in additional_controlled_term_props %}
        % {{ prop.doc }}
        {{ prop.name }} {{prop.size}} {{ prop.type }} {%- if prop.validators%} ...{% endif %}
        {%- if prop.validators %}
            {{prop.validators}}
        {%- endif -%}
    {%- if not loop.last -%}
        {{ ' ' }}
    {% endif %}
    {%- endfor %}
    end
    {%- endif %}

    methods
        function obj = {{ class_name }}(instanceSpec, propValues)
            arguments
                instanceSpec = []
                propValues.?{{ full_class_name }}
                propValues.id (1,1) string
            end

            propValues = namedargs2cell(propValues);
            obj@openminds.abstract.ControlledTerm(instanceSpec, propValues{:})
        end
    end

    methods (Static)
        function instances = listInstances()
            instances = openminds.controlledterms.{{ class_name }}.CONTROLLED_INSTANCES';
        end
    end
end
